top3.sql:
SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  AND overall_rating > (
    SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  )
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
  AND overall_rating > (
    SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
  )
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  AND overall_rating > (
    SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  )
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH avg_rating_2010 AS (
  SELECT AVG(overall_rating) AS avg_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes
  WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
)
SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes, avg_rating_2010
WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  AND overall_rating > avg_rating
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
  AND overall_rating > (
    SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
  )
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  AND overall_rating > (
    SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  )
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH avg_rating_2010 AS (
  SELECT AVG(overall_rating) AS avg_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes
  WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
),
above_avg_players AS (
  SELECT player_api_id, overall_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes
  WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
    AND overall_rating > (SELECT avg_rating FROM avg_rating_2010)
)
SELECT player_api_id
FROM above_avg_players
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH avg_rating_2010 AS (
  SELECT AVG(overall_rating) AS avg_rating
  FROM Player_Attributes
  WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
)
SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes, avg_rating_2010
WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  AND overall_rating > avg_rating
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  AND overall_rating > (
    SELECT AVG(overall_rating)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE date LIKE '2010%'
  )
ORDER BY overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;
